name: City Pawn
description_short: City Pawn Inc is a federally licensed pawnbroker in Tampa, FL specializing in firearms and other collateral-based lending.
description_long:
City Pawn Inc operates as a federally licensed pawnbroker based in Tampa, Florida, holding an active Federal Firearms License (FFL) issued by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives (ATF). The business is located at 3901 E Hillsborough Ave in Tampa's Hillsborough County and has maintained continuous federal licensing with their current license valid through January 1, 2028.

As a Type 02 FFL licensee, City Pawn Inc is authorized to engage in pawnbroking activities involving firearms other than destructive devices. This means they accept firearms as collateral for loans and facilitate firearm transfers under strict ATF regulatory compliance. The company operates under federal oversight and must maintain proper documentation and verification protocols for all firearms transactions, including the requirement that customers provide valid FFLs before any firearm transfers occur.

City Pawn Inc's primary distinction is their federal licensing status and specialization in firearms collateral. Unlike many general pawn shops, their FFL designation indicates they have met stringent federal requirements and regulatory standards set by the ATF. This licensing allows them to legally accept firearms as loan collateral and process firearms-related transactions in compliance with 27 CFR 478.94 and related federal regulations.

The company serves a niche market of customers seeking collateral-based loans, particularly those with firearms or valuable items to pledge. However, prospective customers should note that specific details about loan terms, interest rates, fees, the full range of accepted collateral items, and customer service policies are not available on this FFL registry page. Direct contact with the business is necessary to understand their complete service offerings, lending criteria, and operational policies.
pros: Federally licensed by ATF with active FFL (1-59-057-02-8A-51800) valid through January 1, 2028
Specialized in firearms transactions with proper regulatory compliance under 27 CFR 478.94
Established physical location in Tampa, FL with verifiable contact information (813-237-5992)
Type 02 FFL designation indicates authorized dealer status for pawnbroking firearms transactions
Registered with IRS Region 1, District 59, providing verifiable federal standing
cons: Website provides only FFL registry information with no details on loan terms, APR, fees, or repayment options
No information available about accepted collateral items beyond firearms
Firearm transfers require customers to obtain and provide valid FFL copies, adding complexity to transactions
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials accessible from provided website content
Limited transparency regarding business hours, loan amounts offered, or service areas
best_for: Individuals with firearms seeking short-term collateral-based loans
Gun owners needing quick cash without credit checks
Customers in the Tampa, FL area with valuable items to pawn
diagnosis: City Pawn Inc is best for individuals in the Tampa area seeking collateral-based loans who possess firearms or other valuable items to pledge. The main caveat is that this FFL registry listing provides only licensing verification and contact information; borrowers must contact the business directly to learn actual loan terms, fees, interest rates, and complete service offerings before making any commitments.
services: Federal Firearms License (FFL) compliant firearm transactions
Firearm transfers under ATF regulation 27 CFR 478.94
Documentation and verification of firearms transactions
